sidebar.switchError: Unable to switch workspace. Please try again.

sync_wizard.title: Connect & Sync
sync_wizard.description: Connect your data source and choose which tables to sync.
sync_wizard.step1_description: Connect your account to get started. A popup will open for you to authorize access.
sync_wizard.step2_description: Choose which base or database you'd like to sync with this workspace.
sync_wizard.no_bases: No bases or databases found. Make sure your account has at least one.
sync_wizard.step3_description: Select the tables to sync and optionally add filters to limit which records are imported.
sync_wizard.quota_exceeded: The selected tables exceed your plan's record quota. Remove tables or add filters to reduce the count.
sync_wizard.large_table_warning: This table has over 10,000 records. Consider adding filters to reduce sync time.
sync_wizard.sync_started: Sync started successfully. Records will appear as they are imported.
sync_wizard.error_load_bases: Failed to load bases. Please try again.
sync_wizard.error_load_tables: Failed to load tables. Please try again.
sync_wizard.error_start_sync: Failed to start sync. Please try again.
sync_wizard.error_quota_check: Failed to check quota. Please try again.

sync_filter_editor.quota_exceeded: This filter would exceed your record quota by {overage} records.
sync_filter_editor.save_error: Failed to save filter. Please try again.
sync_filter_editor.no_filter: No filter applied — syncing all records.

sync_orphans.banner_message: {count, plural, one {# record} other {# records}} no longer match your sync filter. These records exist in EveryStack but are no longer being synced from Airtable. They won't receive updates.
sync_orphans.row_indicator_tooltip: This record is no longer synced — it was excluded by a sync filter change on {date}.
sync_orphans.filtered_out_tooltip: This record exists on {platform} but is outside your sync filter.

sync_conflicts.title_multi: {count, plural, one {# Conflict} other {# Conflicts}} on "{record}"
sync_conflicts.description: This record was edited both in EveryStack and on the source platform. Choose which value to keep for each field.
sync_conflicts.pending_count: {count, plural, one {# conflict pending} other {# conflicts pending}}
sync_conflicts.resolve_error: Failed to resolve conflict. Please try again.
sync_conflicts.cell_tooltip: Conflict: edited both locally and on {platform}. Click to resolve.
sync_conflicts.toolbar_badge_readonly: {count, plural, one {# conflict} other {# conflicts}} (pending resolution)
sync_conflicts.row_badge_tooltip: This row has {count, plural, one {# conflict} other {# conflicts}}. Click to resolve.
sync_conflicts.team_member_tooltip: This field has a sync conflict. A Manager will resolve it.
sync_conflicts.bulk_resolve_record_success: All conflicts on this record resolved.
sync_conflicts.bulk_resolve_table_success: All conflicts in this table resolved.

sync_status.tooltip_stale: Sync may be delayed. Check connection status.
sync_status.tooltip_auth_required: Your {platform} connection needs re-authentication. Click to reconnect.
sync_status.tooltip_paused: Sync is paused by a manager.
sync_status.tooltip_conflicts: {count, plural, one {# sync conflict pending} other {# sync conflicts pending}}. Click to resolve.
sync_status.tooltip_detail_records: {count, plural, one {# record synced} other {# records synced}}
sync_status.tooltip_detail_consecutive_failures: {count, plural, one {# consecutive failure} other {# consecutive failures}}

sync_sidebar.tooltip_conflicts: {count, plural, one {# sync conflict. Click to resolve.} other {# sync conflicts. Click to resolve.}}

sync_failures_tab.empty: No sync failures. All records synced successfully.
sync_failures_tab.failure_count: {count, plural, one {# pending failure} other {# pending failures}}
sync_failures_tab.error_schema_mismatch: Field structure does not match the expected schema.
sync_failures_tab.error_payload_too_large: Record data exceeds the size limit.
sync_failures_tab.error_platform_rejected: The source platform rejected this record.
sync_failures_tab.error_unknown: An unexpected error occurred during sync.
sync_failures_tab.retry_error: Failed to retry. Please try again.
sync_failures_tab.skip_error: Failed to skip. Please try again.

sync_recovery.auth_expired_message: Your connection to {platform} has expired. Re-authenticate to resume syncing.
sync_recovery.permission_denied_message: Your {platform} integration no longer has write access to this base. Ask the {platform} admin to restore permissions.
sync_recovery.retry_success: Retry enqueued. Sync will resume shortly.

sync_schema_changes.empty: No schema changes detected. Field definitions are in sync.
sync_schema_changes.pending_count: {count, plural, one {# pending schema change} other {# pending schema changes}}
sync_schema_changes.impact_formulas: {count, plural, one {# formula field} other {# formula fields}}
sync_schema_changes.impact_portals: {count, plural, one {# portal binding} other {# portal bindings}}
sync_schema_changes.action_error: Failed to apply change. Please try again.

sync_quota.title: Record quota reached
sync_quota.usage: Your workspace has {current} of {quota} records ({plan} plan limit).
sync_quota.unsynced_with_table: {count} records from "{table}" could not be synced.
sync_quota.add_filter: Add Sync Filter — Reduce inbound records with filters
sync_quota.upgrade_plan: Upgrade Plan — Increase your record quota
sync_quota.delete_records: Delete Records — Free up space by removing old records
sync_quota.disable_tables: Disable Tables — Stop syncing tables you don't need
sync_quota.resume_success: Sync resumed. Catching up on skipped records.
sync_quota.resume_error: Failed to resume sync. Please try again.

sync_dashboard.title: Sync Settings
sync_dashboard.header_records: {count, plural, one {# record synced} other {# records synced}}
sync_dashboard.disconnect_confirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect this sync connection? Synced data will remain as local-only records.
sync_dashboard.overview_minutes_ago: {count, plural, one {# minute ago} other {# minutes ago}}
sync_dashboard.overview_hours_ago: {count, plural, one {# hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
sync_dashboard.overview_days_ago: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}
sync_dashboard.tables_filters_applied: {count, plural, one {# filter applied} other {# filters applied}}
sync_dashboard.tables_unsaved_changes: {count, plural, one {# table changed} other {# tables changed}}
sync_dashboard.tables_empty: No tables configured. Run the sync wizard to select tables.
sync_dashboard.conflicts_count: {count, plural, one {# pending conflict} other {# pending conflicts}}
sync_dashboard.conflicts_empty: No pending conflicts. All records are in sync.
